title: Cobblemon Lite
description: A lightweight modpack based around Cobblemon (Fabric) for maximum performance.
body:
Cobblemon Lite

Updated for Cobblemon 1.4 - Friends and Farms! This modpack aims to provide the highest performance Cobblemon experience in the world! At the core of this project is the Adrenaline modpack - the best performance layer modpack on Modrinth. Please check out their wiki for tips on further configuring most of the mods. This modpack also adds:
  • No Chat Reports - disabling telemetry and chat reporting in game
  • Mod Menu - allowing mods to be managed easier
